title: Theo's Sleepy Feelings
synopsis: Little Theo learns to understand and express his nighttime feelings as he gets ready for bed, discovering that all feelings are okay and bedtime can be peaceful.

pages.text: Theo was getting ready for bed. He felt lots of big feelings swirling around inside him. Sometimes he felt happy. Sometimes he felt sad. Sometimes he felt worried about the dark.

illustration.description: A little boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes sitting on his bed in pajamas, surrounded by swirling soft watercolor clouds in dreamy purple and blue gradients representing different emotions, with gentle moonlight streaming through the window and glowing stars beginning to appear
illustration.alt: Theo sitting on his bed with emotion clouds around him

pages.text: Mama sat down next to Theo. 'It's okay to have big feelings,' she said gently. 'Tell me what you're feeling right now.' Theo thought for a moment.

illustration.description: A tender scene showing a mother sitting beside a little boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes on a bed, both with round sleepy faces in soft watercolor style, surrounded by floating clouds and dreamy purple and blue gradients, with glowing stars twinkling outside the window in an ethereal atmosphere
illustration.alt: Theo talking with his mama on the bed

pages.text: 'I feel excited about tomorrow,' said Theo. 'But I also feel a little scared of bad dreams.' Mama nodded. 'Those are both important feelings. What else do you feel?'

illustration.description: Close-up of a little boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes with a thoughtful expression, his round sleepy face rendered in soft watercolor with dreamy purple and blue gradients swirling gently around him, glowing stars reflected in his eyes creating an ethereal atmosphere with pastel palette

pages.text: 'I feel tired,' Theo yawned. 'And I feel cozy in my warm pajamas. I feel loved when you're here with me.' Mama smiled and gave him a gentle hug.

illustration.description: A warm embrace between mother and child, showing a little boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes being hugged, both figures with round sleepy faces in soft watercolor style, surrounded by floating clouds in dreamy purple and blue gradients, gentle moonlight casting a glow over them in an ethereal atmosphere
illustration.alt: Theo getting a hug from mama

pages.text: 'All your feelings are okay,' Mama whispered. 'Now let's take some slow, deep breaths together.' They breathed in and out, in and out. Theo felt calmer.

illustration.description: A peaceful scene of a little boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes lying in bed with his mother beside him, both with round sleepy faces taking deep breaths, rendered in soft watercolor with floating clouds drifting peacefully around them, dreamy purple and blue gradients creating a serene atmosphere with glowing stars overhead
illustration.alt: Theo and mama breathing together peacefully

pages.text: As Mama tucked him in, Theo felt safe and sleepy. 'Good night, sweet dreams,' she said softly. Theo closed his eyes, feeling peaceful. All his feelings were tucked in too.

illustration.description: A dreamy bedtime scene showing a little boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes peacefully sleeping in bed with his round sleepy face serene and content, soft watercolor clouds floating above him in dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars twinkling through the window, gentle moonlight creating an ethereal atmosphere with a pastel palette
illustration.alt: Theo sleeping peacefully in his bed

metadata.illustrationStyle: soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette

questions.question: What did Theo feel about tomorrow?
questions.explanation: Theo said he felt excited about tomorrow, even though he also felt a little scared of bad dreams.

questions.question: What did Mama say about Theo's feelings?
questions.explanation: Mama told Theo that all his feelings are okay and important.

questions.question: What did Theo and Mama do together to feel calmer?
questions.explanation: Theo and Mama took slow, deep breaths together, which helped Theo feel calmer.

questions.question: How did Theo feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: By the end, Theo felt peaceful and safe as he went to sleep.
